name: io.fonteum/mcp-server
title: Fonteum — Healthcare Provider Data (hosted)
description: Hosted, read-only MCP server for the source-provenanced US federal healthcare provider data graph. Resolve providers by NPI across NPPES, OIG LEIE, CMS PECOS, Care Compare, and Open Payments; list the 23 federal source families; read published methodology. Every field carries a 14-tuple provenance contract (source, snapshot, methodology, license, coverage window, signed build attestation).

headers.name: x-fonteum-mcp-key
headers.description: Optional. Anonymous access is rate-limited per IP (30 requests/minute). Set a key to lift the limit. Request one at mcp@fonteum.com.

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List the 23 federal source families Fonteum reconciles every healthcare-provider field against, each with authority, tier, refresh cadence, and official source URL.

tools.name: get_provider
tools.description: Look up a single healthcare provider by NPI (10-digit, Luhn-checked); returns specialty, taxonomy, and location with per-field provenance.

tools.name: search_providers
tools.description: Search healthcare providers by vertical + state (optional county); returns up to 100 records with provenance.

tools.name: get_methodology
tools.description: Return the Fonteum methodology version, the canonical /methodology URL, and the fourteen-field provenance contract spec.
